text:
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
  >Originator:     Gianmarco Giovannelli
  >Organization:   Private
  >Confidential:   no
  >Synopsis:       Update Port misc/fortuneit
  >Severity:       non-critical
  >Priority:       medium
  >Category:       ports
  >Release:        FreeBSD 4.0-CURRENT i386
  >Class:          change-request
 
  >Environment:
 
 Any FreeBSD
 
  >Description:
 
 Update port misc/fortuneit removing the wrong www home page
 
  >How-To-Repeat:
 
 
  >Fix:
 
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/misc/fortuneit/pkg/DESCR fortuneit/pkg/DESCR
 --- /usr/ports/misc/fortuneit/pkg/DESCR	Tue May  4 03:15:56 1999
 +++ fortuneit/pkg/DESCR	Tue Nov 23 06:52:35 1999
 @@ -3,7 +3,6 @@
   For further informations please read the README file
   in the working directory (not installed).
 
 -WWW: http://www.pluto.linux.it/~zuse/fortune.it
   Distfile Size: ~400kb
 
   - ported to FreeBSD by Gianmarco (gmarco@giovannelli.it)
 
 
 
 
 
 Best Regards,
 Gianmarco Giovannelli ,  "Unix expert since yesterday"
 http://www.giovannelli.it/~gmarco
 http://www2.masternet.it
